prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 high-detail anime fantasy illustration of Ragnas, a regal lion-themed male beastman prince standing on an ornate palace balcony at night above a glowing European fantasy city. He has long tousled golden blond hair, visible lion ears, a luxurious white fur mantle, and a dramatic black-and-gold open jacket with intricate filigree embroidery, chains, tassels, buckles, a lion-head belt ornament, and a gold lion crest on one shoulder. His muscular bare torso and defined abs are exposed under crossing black leather straps. Pose him in a confident, elegant half-body composition, leaning slightly forward with one black-gloved hand raised near his mouth, shoulders angled, cape and hair catching the light. Place a large opaque brown square censor block over the center of his face, covering the eyes, nose, and mouth while leaving hair and ears visible. The background is a lavish nighttime cityscape with countless warm lights, gothic towers, a full moon in a cloudy starry sky, multiple colorful fireworks bursts, floating golden confetti, and a richly lit palace facade on the right. Use cinematic lighting, warm gold highlights, deep navy shadows, sparkling particles, ultra-detailed linework, glossy metal accents, romantic fantasy atmosphere, and polished gacha-game character art quality. Add small elegant Japanese text at the bottom right reading ランクインありがとう with a tiny crown symbol beneath it. No extra characters, no watermark, no modern objects.
